---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or goal

What problem does this solve, or what would you like to see? (Keep it focused on Bangladeshi Bangla typing on macOS.)

## Proposed solution

A short description of the feature or change you’d like.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Examples, use cases, or references to other input methods/layouts if relevant.
